metadata.title: Mologrind Studios — Worlds Worth Exploring
metadata.description: An indie game studio crafting immersive worlds, memorable adventures, and meaningful experiences inspired by imagination and discovery.

hero.heading: Worlds Worth Exploring
hero.subtext: Mologrind Studios creates immersive worlds, memorable adventures, and meaningful experiences inspired by imagination, curiosity, and discovery.

about.label: About
about.heading: Built From a Story
about.body: Mologrind was originally imagined as a fantasy location in a personal story — a kingdom hidden beyond mist and mountain. Over time, it became the foundation for a creative vision: building games that inspire wonder, exploration, and experiences worth remembering.

projects.label: Projects
projects.heading: Future Adventures
projects.subtext: Glimpses of the worlds taking shape in our workshop. Each is a chapter of a longer journey.

items.title: Untitled Fantasy Project
items.desc: Discover the forgotten secrets of Mologrind.

pillars.title: Discover
pillars.body: Encouraging players to uncover hidden stories.

pillars.title: Remember
pillars.body: Designing experiences that stay with players.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Join the Journey
contact.subtext: We are at the beginning of our adventure. Follow our progress and be part of the worlds we create.

footer.tagline: Every world begins with a story.
